_readme: Canonical macros for recurring foods. Consulted by the /log-day skill BEFORE estimating. When the user corrects a macro estimate, update the matching entry here (or add a new one) so the correction sticks. Prefer per-component entries over whole-meal composites. All macros are per stated serving.

foods.name: Cavendish banana
foods.notes: Settled value used consistently since late April.

foods.name: Meiji High Protein Milk
foods.notes: Logged under many spellings; all the same bottle. '+ banana' composite = 285 / 33.5 / 35.8 / 2.2 / 4.5.

foods.name: Hainanese Chicken Rice (standard)
foods.serving: 270g rice + 120g skin-on boneless breast + 25g cucumber + chilli + soup
foods.notes: History of corrections (Apr 27) before settling. Variants: 15g chilli paste only = 726 / 44.1 / 108 / 12.1 / 3.7; 310g cooked skin-on BI drumstick instead of breast = 966 / 43.9 / 108 / 33.3 / 3.7. Excludes banana.

foods.name: Kung Pao chicken rice bowl + 1 fried egg
aliases: kp chicken rice bowl + fried egg
foods.notes: Portion varies by stall day (logged 670-790). Use 670 as base; '75% rice reduced' variant + banana = 685 / 34.3 / 78.5 / 25.4 / 5.1.

foods.name: BI skinless chicken drumstick + 18g tandoori paste
foods.notes: Derived from the settled '300g drumstick + tandoori + 4 boiled eggs + 10g psyllium = 635' composite minus 4 boiled eggs (~310 / 25 / 2 / 21 / 0) and psyllium. Scale by raw weight.

foods.name: Boiled egg
foods.notes: Standard value consistent with logged composites.

foods.name: Stuff'd Chicken Burrito (loaded)
foods.serving: 1 burrito: cheese, iceberg, tomato salsa, habanero, adobo black beans, butter corn
